description: Use this API to modify new multi terminal dc GIC shunt data from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.8.0. ierr = gic_mtdc_chng(name,bus,ckt,realar)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Mtdc line name, must exist in the working case. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: bus
parameters.description: Base case bus number, must exist in the working case. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ckt
parameters.description: Gic dc shunt circuit identifier. (input; ‘1’ by default).

realar.description: DC resistance in ohms/phase. R must be > 0. When R is not specified or R=0, multi terminal dc shunt is ignored in DC network. (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘r’.

Grounding DC resistance in ohms/phase. When RG is not specified or RG=0, multi terminal dc is treated as solidly grounded when part of DC network. (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rg’.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
